inputs.label: Bogey Rating
inputs.businessContext: The expected score for a bogey golfer under normal course and weather conditions.

inputs.label: Scratch Course Rating
inputs.businessContext: The expected score for a scratch golfer under normal course and weather conditions.

inputs.label: Slope Factor
inputs.businessContext: Constant multiplier to convert rating difference to slope (5.381 for men, 4.24 for women).

inputs.label: Gross Score
inputs.businessContext: Actual strokes taken by the player in the round.
